name: Newforma Architecture & Engineering Project Management API
what_it_does: Newforma REST API for architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) project information management platform. Enables AI agents to manage RFIs and submittals, handle project email and correspondence tracking, manage project team contacts, access project document history, track action items and punch lists, integrate BIM model references, and connect AEC project data with ERP and accounting systems.
use_cases: Managing RFI and submittal workflows from AEC project management agents
Tracking project correspondence and action items from project administration agents
Accessing project document history from design coordination agents
Integrating AEC project data with accounting and project delivery systems from project agents
not_for: Construction contractors without architect/engineer project information management focus
General document management without AEC-specific RFI and submittal workflows
Small architectural firms without formal project information management processes
best_when: An architecture or engineering firm using Newforma wants AI agents to automate RFI and submittal processing, correspondence tracking, action item management, and project data integration with finance systems.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: RFI and submittal data affects construction contract compliance and change order liability. Automated responses to RFIs require engineering review before issuance.

auth.notes: Newforma uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Organization-level credentials. Partner program for technology integrations. Newforma Konekt (newer cloud platform) has different API from legacy Newforma.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — AEC enterprise software pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user enterprise contracts; Newforma Konekt cloud vs on-premises versions
pricing.notes: Manchester, New Hampshire company. Founded 2004. Used by top architecture and engineering firms globally. On-premises and cloud (Konekt) versions. Strong project email and RFI management. Acquired by Kahua in 2024.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: RFI responses and submittals affect construction contract compliance and liability
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
No webhooks — requires polling for RFI and submittal updates
Acquired by Kahua 2024 — API roadmap may integrate with Kahua platform
Legacy on-premises vs Konekt cloud have different API surfaces
US/EU data residency options — verify for international AEC projects
agent_readiness.security_notes: AEC project and contract compliance data. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Kahua subsidiary after 2024 acquisition.

security_score_components.security_notes: AEC project and RFI data. SOC2. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Kahua-acquired 2024.
